---
title: "Week 10 --- Multiple Linear Regression"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 10 Overview

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---|---|---|
| Lecture 1 | MLR Setup & Estimation | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Interpretation of Coefficients | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Partial Effects in Python | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this week are being prepared. Check back soon.
:::
